existing_cta.heading: Career spotlight: from Datablazer thought leader to technical director
existing_cta.body: The DMO doesn’t just train; it creates new leaders. A fantastic success story isAnu Pandey, who began as a DMO speaker and, by sharing her expertise and mentoring others, recently stepped into a new role as Technical Director of AI and Data Cloud at a Salesforce SI Partner.
